---
title: "Edith Fursdon"
---

## Edith Fursdon

**Dates:** (1839-1915)

### Description

sister of Charlotte and Henrietta Fursdon

### Biography

Eldest daughter of the Rev. Edward Fursdon, she was not a Gosling but probably contributed illustrations to <i>The Barnacle</i> [LG 1952 Fursdon]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
